title: poa colensoi var. guthrie-smithiana

side_effects: Poa colensoi var. guthrie-smithiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Overuse of the plant's essential oils can also cause dizziness, headaches, and interact with certain medications, potentially exacerbating health conditions.
